lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਕੋਟੰਤਰ ਕੇ ਪਾਪ ਬਿਨਾਸਨ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kott kottantar ke paap binaasan har saachaa man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Millions upon millions of sins are erased, when the mind comes to love the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਡੀਠਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilavikh bhau bhanjan guramukh eko ddeetthaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It is the Destroyer of the sins, the guilt and fears of countless incarnations; the Gurmukh sees the One Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਬੁਝਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har bin avar na soojhai doojaa satigur ek bujhaaeaa |1|
lines.english: I do not know any other, except the Lord; the True Guru has revealed the One Lord to me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਜਿਨ ਘਟਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: prem padaarath jin ghatt vasiaa sahaje rahe samaaee |
lines.english: Those whose hearts are filled with the wealth of the Lord's Love, remain intuitively absorbed in Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲੇ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabad rate se rang chaloole raate sehaj subhaaee |2|
lines.english: Imbued with the Shabad, they are dyed in the deep crimson color of His Love. They are imbued with the Lord's celestial peace and poise. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਲਾਲ ਭਈ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa sabad veechaar ras raatee laal bhee rang laaee |
lines.english: Contemplating the Shabad, the tongue is imbued with joy; embracing His Love, it is dyed a deep crimson.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਹਕੇਵਲੁ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿਆ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਆਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raam naam nihakeval jaaniaa man tripatiaa saant aaee |3|
lines.english: I have come to know the Name of the Pure Detached Lord; my mind is satisfied and comforted. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad niranjan paaeaa saachai sabad veechaaree |4|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have found the Immaculate Lord; I contemplate the True Word of the Shabad. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪੜੑਿ ਪੜੑਿ ਮੋਨੀ ਸਭਿ ਥਾਕੇ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭੇਖ ਥਕੇ ਭੇਖਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: panddit parra parra monee sabh thaake bhram bhekh thake bhekhadhaaree |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, read and study, and all the silent sages have grown weary; they have grown weary of wearing their religious robes and wandering all around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਸਚਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਾਚ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aavaa gaun nivaar sach raate saach sabad man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: My coming and going in reincarnation is ended, and I am imbued with Truth; the True Word of the Shabad is pleasing to my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sadaa sukh paaeeai jin vichahu aap gavaaeaa |5|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, eternal peace is found, and self-conceit is eliminated from within. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਮਨਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saachai sabad sehaj dhun upajai man saachai liv laaee |
lines.english: Through the True Word of the Shabad, the celestial melody wells up, and the mind is lovingly focused on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: agam agochar naam niranjan guramukh man vasaaee |6|
lines.english: The Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Inaccessible and Unfathomable Lord, abides in the mind of the Gurmukh. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਸ ਮਹਿ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਏਕੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: ekas meh sabh jagato varatai viralaa ek pachhaanai |
lines.english: The whole world is contained in the One Lord. How rare are those who understand the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੂਝੈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sabad marai taa sabh kichh soojhai anadin eko jaanai |7|
lines.english: One who dies in the Shabad comes to know everything; night and day, he realizes the One Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਏਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate sadaa bairaagee ek sabad liv laaee |8|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are imbued with the Naam are forever detached from the world; they are lovingly attuned to the One Word of the Shabad. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਬੂਝੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare soee jan boojhai hor kahanaa kathan na jaaee |
lines.english: That humble being, upon whom the Lord casts His Glance of Grace, understands. Nothing else can be said.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Saarang, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: man mere har kee akath kahaanee |
lines.english: O my mind, the Speech of the Lord is unspoken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਜਾਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har nadar kare soee jan paae guramukh viralai jaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: That humble being who is blessed by the Lord's Glance of Grace, obtains it. How rare is that Gurmukh who understands. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੁ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har gahir ganbheer gunee gaheer gur kai sabad pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: The Lord is Deep, Profound and Unfathomable, the Ocean of Excellence; He is realized through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਹਿ ਭਾਇ ਦੂਜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਬਉਰਾਨਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bahu bidh karam kareh bhaae doojai bin sabadai bauraaniaa |1|
lines.english: Mortals do their deeds in all sorts of ways, in the love of duality; but without the Shabad, they are insane. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਮੈਲਾ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har naam naavai soee jan niramal fir mailaa mool na hoee |
lines.english: That humble being who bathes in the Lord's Name becomes immaculate; he never becomes polluted again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਹੈ ਮੈਲਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam binaa sabh jag hai mailaa doojai bharam pat khoee |2|
lines.english: Without the Name, the whole world is polluted; wandering in duality, it loses its honor. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਨਾਮੋ ਹੋਇ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: hohi deaal kripaa kar har jeeo naamo hoe sakhaaee |3|
lines.english: O Dear Lord, Your Name is the Help and Support of those whom You bless with Your kindness and compassion. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਂ ਕਿਆ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਿ ਤਿਆਗੀ ਮੈ ਤਾ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa drirraan kiaa sangreh tiaagee mai taa boojh na paaee |
lines.english: What should I grasp? What should I gather up or leave behind? I do not know.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guroo duaarai soee boojhai jis no aap bujhaae |4|
lines.english: He alone comes to understand, who enters the Guru's Gate, whom the Lord Himself instructs. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕਰਮ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਇ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa sach daataa karam bidhaataa jis bhaavai tis naae laae |
lines.english: The True Lord is the True Giver, the Architect of Destiny; as He pleases, He links mortals to the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਚੇਤੇ ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: dekh bisamaad ihu man nahee chete aavaa gaun sansaaraa |
lines.english: Even gazing upon the wonders of the Lord, this mind does not think of Him. The world comes and goes in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਪਾਏ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur seve soee boojhai paae mokh duaaraa |5|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, the mortal comes to understand, and finds the Door of Salvation. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ਰਹਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sach sanjam karanee kirat kamaaveh aavan jaan rahaaee |6|
lines.english: They practice truth, self-restraint and good deeds; their comings and goings are ended. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਦਰੁ ਸੂਝੈ ਸੇ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵਿਗਾੜਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jina dar soojhai se kade na vigaarreh satigur boojh bujhaaee |
lines.english: Those who understand the Lord's Court, never suffer separation from him. The True Guru has imparted this understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: se dar saachai saach kamaaveh jin guramukh saach adhaaraa |
lines.english: In the Court of the True Lord, they practice Truth. The Gurmukhs take the Support of the True Lord.
